title: delphinium aemulans var. aemulans
intro: Delphinium aemulans var. aemulans is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the Aemulans Larkspur. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Delphinium aemulans var. aemulans include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in homeopathy and folk medicine.
